---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for this project
title: "[Feature]"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## What would you like to see?

Describe the feature or improvement you would like in the mod.
## Why would this be useful?
Explain why this feature would be helpful or improve gameplay.

## How do you imagine it working?
If possible, describe how you think the feature should work.

## Examples or references (optional)
Screenshots, videos, or examples from other mods that show something similar.

## Additional information (optional)
Anything else you would like to share.
